Composite district structural NCD-risk vulnerability index (first principal component of poverty_incidence, poverty_intensity, illiteracy_rate, uninsured_rate, unemployment_rate, dependency_ratio; z-scored inputs; oriented higher=more vulnerable; PC1 explains 56.5% of variance; Cronbach's alpha=0.801)

Second, independently-named vulnerability dimension (PC2 of the same 6-component PCA) capturing insurance-access gaps -- reported separately per Stage 3 council correction, since uninsured_rate loads near-zero on PC1 (0.043) but strongly on PC2 (0.658) and would be functionally inert if folded into a single collapsed index
transform: PC2 of the same PCA as vulnerability_index_pc1, oriented so higher uninsured_rate loads positively
